* agent.execplan.v1
:PROPERTIES:
:CONTRACT_ID: agent.execplan.v1
:CONTRACT_SCOPE: document
:CONTRACT_KIND: org-elements
:END:

** execplan-has-root
:PROPERTIES:
:ASSERT_ID: execplan.has-root
:END:
#+BEGIN_SRC org-contract
(assert exists
  (headline :summary-contains (title "ExecPlan")))
#+END_SRC

:PROPERTIES:
:ASSERT_ID: execplan.has-purpose
:END:
#+BEGIN_SRC org-contract
